_comment: Interview agent configuration. Model names and parameters are the only adapter-specific settings here. All intelligence lives in prompts/ and data/.

api._note: Claude claude-opus-4-5 performs best at temperature 1 for conversational tasks. Do not lower unless the model becomes unpredictably verbose.

interview._note: The agent checks shouldEnd on every turn but won't end before minTurnsBeforeEnd unless the seller explicitly stops.
